sheet_name: ขยายฐานราก F4,F6
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า32.png
view_title: ขยายฐานราก F4,F6 (4-pile and 6-pile caps)
schema_note: Same custom-field convention as S-09 -- element_type:footing with dowel_bar/tie_bar/mat_bar. pile_count field added for pile-cap-specific data.

tie_bar.note: 1Ø9mm รัดรอบ (single wrap tie)

dowel_bar.note: 5Ø12mm + 5Ø12mm printed as two separate lines -- read as top and bottom layer of a 2-layer mat, 10 bars total

tie_bar.note: 1Ø9mm รัดรอบ (single wrap tie)

warnings: F6's dowel bar count (10 vs. possibly just 5) needs human zoom review -- the drawing shows '5Ø12มม.' printed twice with separate leader lines, which could denote a top layer of 5 and a bottom layer of 5 (10 total, consistent with a 6-pile cap needing more reinforcement than the 4-pile F4's 8 bars), or could be two leaders pointing to the same single layer of 5 bars from different angles. Recorded as 10 with a confidence flag rather than guessing silently.
